title: filago aegaea subsp. aristata
intro: Filago aegaea subsp. aristata, also known as Crested Cudweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Crested Cudweed include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Filago aegaea subsp. aristata include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
